summary: Current upper bound is 3.75%, next FOMC meeting March 17-18, CME FedWatch shows 91.1% probability of no change in March
content:
Key facts:
- Current DFEDTARU: 3.75% (since December 2025 cut)
- Jan 28, 2026 FOMC: Held rates at 3.50-3.75%
- Next FOMC meeting: March 17-18, 2026 (before March 31 resolution date)
- CME FedWatch (as of early Feb 2026): 91.1% probability rates unchanged at March meeting, 8.9% probability of 25bp cut
- Fed described economy as "solid", uncertainty elevated, wait-and-see mode
- No emergency rate actions expected
- Rate hike probability essentially zero based on current conditions
